source.ref: Flexi, fishbrain, Geiss + Martin - tokamak witchery

display.name: Tokamak witchery
display.author: Flexi/fishbrain/Geiss/Martin
display.blurb: Magnetic plasma fields twist in a confinement vortex; bass tightens the spiral.

annotation.technical_notes: A highly distorted feedback loop utilizes a per-pixel warp shader to displace the buffer, creating sharp, metallic, cliff-like ridges that shear violently to the bass. Fine-lined custom waves (spirals and geometric vectors) are overlaid, twitching rapidly to the treble. The color palette cycles through highly saturated hues, blending deep oranges and purples via sampler_main feedback.
